species: Overexpression of Flag-tagged BZW2 in HEK293 cells followed by immunoprecipitation confirmed BZW2 interaction with BCAP31, VDAC2, and MIC60.
disease_state: This study uncovers a novel molecular function of BZW2 including promoting mitochondria-ER contact, mitochondrial calcium, and ATP production.
sample_source: Overexpression of Flag-tagged BZW2 in HEK293 cells followed by immunoprecipitation confirmed BZW2 interaction with BCAP31, VDAC2, and MIC60.
